summary.label: Main experience
summary.description: International apprenticeship in e-commerce, logistics and supply chain.

anchanto.title: Junior Deployment Consultant
anchanto.description: Contributed to the deployment and ongoing support of SaaS solutions for e-commerce, logistics and supply chain operations. Worked with OMS, WMS and OXM platforms while collaborating with French clients and international technical and functional teams.

missions.deployment: Configured and deployed OMS, WMS and OXM solutions.
missions.testing: Performed functional testing and verified operational flows before production.
missions.support: Analyzed and monitored customer incidents using Zendesk and Jira.
missions.product: Formalized product improvement requests using Aha!.
missions.localization: Adapted product interfaces for the French market using Crowdin and JSON files.
missions.accountManagement: Monitored existing accounts, prioritized incidents and coordinated internal actions.

realEstate.title: Web Developer
realEstate.description: Analyzed client requirements, developed website features, deployed the application and verified its proper operation after launch.

stockManagement.title: Full-Stack Developer — Inventory Management Application
stockManagement.description: Designed an application enabling a company to manage inventory, customers, sales, orders and products using Django, Python and JavaScript.

captcha.title: Full-Stack Developer — CAPTCHA System
captcha.description: Developed a human-bot authentication mechanism based on a challenge-response system using PHP, SQL and JavaScript.

tutoring.title: Private Tutor
